title: Fridericus Rex - 2. Teil: Vater und Sohn
writer: Hans Behrendt, Bobby E. Lüthge, Arzén von Cserépy
actors: Otto Gebühr, Albert Steinrück, Gertrud de Lalsky
plot: Part 2 of a four part series of biographical films about Friedrich II of Prussia tells of his continued interest in music, his marriage to Elisabeth-Christine von Braunschweig-Bevern, and the death of his father following which he...
